description: Verify that the food safety plan satisfies: (1) Conduct hazard analysis
input_data: A written food safety plan referencing 21 CFR 117.130 under parent REQ-117.130-001
expected_output: Requirement REQ-117.130-001A is present, documented in writing, and correctly addressed per 21 CFR 117.130
steps: 1. Open the food safety plan document.
2. Locate the section addressing: (1) Conduct hazard analysis
3. Confirm the section exists and is written (not verbal-only).
4. Verify the content satisfies 21 CFR 117.130 – REQ-117.130-001A.
5. Check that the parent requirement (REQ-117.130-001) is also addressed.
notes: Source regulation: 21 CFR 117.130. Parent requirement: REQ-117.130-001. This is an atomic rule – test it independently.
